title: approvals.proposed_payload — action_type=lms_grant (v1)
description: Payload contract for a proposed LMS access grant. Validated app-side (Windmill + Lane A UI). Not enforced in Postgres.

contact_id.description: FK target in the `contacts` collection. Polymorphic context_id should usually point to this same row.

course_slug.description: Stable LMS course identifier. Slug, not numeric ID, to survive LMS-side renumbering.

grant_kind.description: Access level. v1 supports the three LMS roles in production today.

grant_until.description: Optional access expiration. If null, grant is open-ended (LMS-side default applies).

summary_hebrew.description: 1–2 sentence Hebrew summary for the approval card.

cohort_id.description: Optional reference to a cohort row driving the grant.
